identity.name: Browser — Sideloaded Risky Chrome Extension
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-003. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1176. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-003. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1176. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-BROWSER-003.
UC: Managed-Browser Extension Risk Policy / TC: Sideloaded .crx with Overbroad Permissions Triggers Block.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-BROWSER-003 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Inspect the malicious extension source tree (code-scan signal)
ls -la sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/chrome/ai-page-summarizer/
jq '.permissions, .host_permissions' \
  sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/chrome/ai-page-summarizer/manifest.json
# step-2: Attempt sideload via browser_attack_runner; expect policy block
cat > /tmp/sim-browser-003-eal.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-BROWSER-003
name: "Browser — risky extension install"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - chrome.cortexsim-test.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [browser, extension, sideload]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: browser_attack_runner
    params:
      campaign_path: scenarios/browser/campaigns/risky-extension-install.yml
      allowlist_host: chrome.cortexsim-test.invalid
      browser_channel: prisma
      headless: true
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/sim-browser-003-eal.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm post-block telemetry
echo "[CortexSim] Confirm in XSIAM: extension-install-attempt event with outcome=blocked."
